sentences.text: Thank you for calling Metro housing Boston to continue in English press one. Please listen carefully as our menu options have recently changed if you are a voucher holder press one. If you are an owner or property manager press two. If you have questions for our housing consumer education Center about housing related request or community resources, including the raft financial assistance program press three, if you are inquiring about how to apply for housing assistance or want to check the status on your waiting list application press four all program descriptions and forms are available on our website at Metro housing Boston dot org to speak with the receptionist press zero to repeat this menu press eight. Please stay on the line. While your call is transferred to the operator your call is very important to us. Please wait for the next available agent.

Uh-huh, yes, I'll transfer you. Hi, you've reached Erica pain at Metro has from Boston. I'm unavailable at this time, but I will respond to your message within two business days for mediate assistance, you may contact or at least housing Gateway department at six, one seven four two five six six one one four I reach them via email at Gateway at Metro housing Boston don't work. Thank you.
Hey Erica, this is Elise calling following up to an email I sent you earlier today. If you can give me a call when you get a chance. I would appreciate
it. Two. Oh three four six four one three nine nine, thank you.
